title: Department Highest Salary
description: Find employees who earn the highest salary in their department.
constraints: id is the primary key of Employee
id is the primary key of Department
departmentId is a foreign key referencing Department.id
Multiple employees in the same department can share the highest salary (ties are included)
key_concept: Correlated subquery with MAX() or window RANK() PARTITION BY dept ORDER BY salary DESC.

hints.L1: For each employee, check if their salary equals the max in their department.
hints.L2: WHERE (e.departmentId, e.salary) IN (SELECT departmentId, MAX(salary) FROM Employee GROUP BY departmentId).
hints.L3: SELECT d.name AS Department, e.name AS Employee, e.salary FROM Employee e JOIN Department d ON e.departmentId = d.id WHERE (e.departmentId, e.salary) IN (SELECT departmentId, MAX(salary) FROM Employee GROUP BY departmentId)
